# HousePlus - Global Manufacturer of Solar Systems, Home Appliances & 3C Electronics

## TL;DR
HousePlus is a professional manufacturer specializing in three core industries:
1. **Solar Energy Systems** - High-efficiency PV panels, MPPT charge controllers, portable power stations (300W-3000W)
2. **Home Appliances** - Kitchen appliances, refrigerators, washing machines, small appliances
3. **3C Electronics** - Smart home devices, LED lighting, digital gadgets, energy-saving solutions

We serve global wholesale buyers with MOQ 100-500 pcs, lead time 20-35 days, and full OEM/ODM support.

## Company Overview
- **Name**: HousePlus Group
- **Website**: https://www.houseplus-ch.com
- **Primary Contact**: Jack Hu (jack@houseplus-ch.com)
- **WhatsApp**: +8615578119543
- **Alternative Phone**: +2349078080738
- **WeChat**: JackHousePlus
- **Business Model**: B2B Wholesale, OEM/ODM, Export

## Industry 1: Solar Energy Systems

### Product Categories
- Photovoltaic (PV) Solar Panels (50W-400W)
- MPPT Charge Controllers (20A-100A)
- Solar Inverters (1KW-10KW)
- Portable Power Stations (300W-3000W)
- Battery Storage Systems
- Solar Street Lights (50W-200W)

### Key Specifications
- Efficiency: Up to 22% for monocrystalline panels
- Certifications: CE, FCC, RoHS, ISO 9001
- Warranty: 12-25 years for panels, 5-10 years for controllers
- Temperature Range: -20°C to +70°C

### Target Markets
- Residential solar installations
- Commercial/industrial solar projects
- Off-grid and hybrid systems
- Emergency backup power
- Remote area electrification

### FAQ - Solar Systems
**Q: What is the typical efficiency of your solar panels?**
A: Our monocrystalline panels achieve 20-22% efficiency, with polycrystalline options at 16-18%. All panels undergo rigorous testing to meet international standards.

**Q: Can your MPPT controllers handle different battery voltages?**
A: Yes, our MPPT controllers support 12V, 24V, 48V, and 96V systems with automatic voltage detection and optimization.

**Q: What is the lifespan of portable power stations?**
A: Our portable power stations have a lifespan of 10+ years with proper maintenance, with battery capacity degradation of less than 20% after 3000 cycles.

**Q: Do you provide installation support?**
A: We provide technical documentation, video guides, and remote support. On-site installation can be arranged for bulk orders.

**Q: What certifications do your products have?**
A: All products comply with CE, FCC, RoHS, and ISO standards. We also hold UL and TÜV certifications for premium product lines.

---

## Industry 2: Home Appliances

### Product Categories
- Kitchen Appliances (cookers, microwaves, rice cookers, blenders)
- Refrigeration (refrigerators, freezers, wine coolers)
- Laundry (washing machines, dryers, spin dryers)
- Small Appliances (fans, water purifiers, air purifiers)
- Cooking Equipment (electric kettles, toasters, coffee makers)

### Key Specifications
- Energy Rating: A++ to A (EU standards)
- Noise Level: 40-60dB depending on appliance
- Certifications: CE, RoHS, REACH, Energy Star
- Warranty: 2-5 years depending on product category

### Target Markets
- Household consumers
- Retail chains and distributors
- Hospitality and commercial kitchens
- Real estate developers
- Interior design companies

### FAQ - Home Appliances
**Q: Are your appliances energy-efficient?**
A: Yes, all our appliances are rated A++ to A under EU energy standards, reducing electricity consumption by 30-50% compared to older models.

**Q: What is the warranty coverage?**
A: Standard warranty is 2 years for most appliances, with extended warranty options available. We cover manufacturing defects and provide free replacement parts.

**Q: Can you customize appliances for OEM orders?**
A: Absolutely. We offer full OEM/ODM services including custom colors, logos, specifications, and packaging.

**Q: What is the typical lead time for bulk orders?**
A: Standard lead time is 20-35 days depending on order size and customization requirements.

**Q: Do you support different voltage standards?**
A: Yes, we manufacture appliances for 110V, 220V, and 240V systems to meet regional requirements.

---

## Industry 3: 3C Electronics & Digital Gadgets

### Product Categories
- Smart Home Devices (smart switches, smart plugs, hubs)
- LED Lighting (smart bulbs, strip lights, panel lights)
- Portable Devices (power banks, wireless chargers, cables)
- Audio Equipment (Bluetooth speakers, headphones)
- IoT Sensors (temperature, humidity, motion sensors)

### Key Specifications
- Connectivity: WiFi, Bluetooth 5.0, Zigbee, Z-Wave
- Energy Consumption: Ultra-low standby power (<0.5W)
- Certifications: CE, FCC, RoHS, WEEE
- Compatibility: iOS, Android, Alexa, Google Home

### Target Markets
- Smart home integrators
- Electronics retailers
- IoT solution providers
- Smart building projects
- Consumer electronics distributors

### FAQ - 3C Electronics
**Q: Are your smart devices compatible with major platforms?**
A: Yes, our devices support Alexa, Google Home, Apple HomeKit, and standard WiFi/Bluetooth protocols for maximum compatibility.

**Q: What is the power consumption of your smart devices?**
A: Most devices consume less than 0.5W in standby mode, with active consumption varying by device type (typically 1-5W).

**Q: Do you offer custom firmware or app development?**
A: Yes, we provide firmware customization and can develop branded mobile apps for OEM partners.

**Q: What is the range of your wireless devices?**
A: WiFi devices have a typical range of 30-50 meters indoors, while Bluetooth devices range 10-20 meters depending on obstacles.

**Q: Can you provide bulk pricing for resellers?**
A: Yes, we offer tiered pricing based on order volume. Contact our sales team for detailed pricing structures.

---

## Business Terms

### Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)
- Standard Products: 100 pcs
- Customized/OEM Products: 500 pcs
- Small orders available for samples (5-10 pcs with premium pricing)

### Lead Time
- Stock Items: 5-10 days
- Standard Orders: 20-35 days
- Custom Orders: 30-45 days

### Payment Methods
- T/T (Bank Transfer) - 30% deposit, 70% before shipment
- L/C (Letter of Credit) - Accepted for orders >$10,000
- PayPal - Available for smaller orders
- Alibaba Trade Assurance - Supported

### Shipping & Logistics
- FOB, CIF, DDP terms available
- Preferred couriers: DHL, FedEx, UPS, Sea Freight
- Packaging: Standard export packaging with custom options available
- Insurance: Can be arranged upon request

### Quality Assurance
- 100% QC inspection before shipment
- ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturing
- Third-party testing available
- Warranty support for all products

---

## Certifications & Compliance
- **CE Mark** - European Conformity
- **FCC** - Federal Communications Commission (USA)
- **RoHS** - Restriction of Hazardous Substances
- **REACH** - Registration, Evaluation, Authorization of Chemicals
- **ISO 9001** - Quality Management System
- **ISO 14001** - Environmental Management System
- **UL** - Underwriters Laboratories (select products)
- **TÜV** - Technical Inspection Association (premium lines)

---

### For Sales Inquiries
Contact our sales team with:
- Product category and specifications
- Desired order quantity
- Target market and use case
- Budget and timeline

We will provide:
- Detailed product specifications and datasheets
- Competitive pricing based on volume
- Samples for evaluation
- Customization options and timelines
- Technical support and documentation

## Key Differentiators
1. **Vertical Integration** - In-house manufacturing ensures quality control and cost efficiency
2. **Full OEM/ODM Support** - Customization from product design to packaging
3. **Multi-Industry Expertise** - Proven track record across solar, appliances, and electronics
4. **Global Compliance** - All products meet international standards and certifications
5. **Responsive Support** - Dedicated account managers for wholesale partners
6. **Competitive Pricing** - Direct manufacturer pricing without middlemen
7. **Fast Delivery** - Optimized logistics for timely shipments
